name: openskeleton-mobile
description: Capacitor tooling manifest for the OpenSkeleton mobile shells. Wraps the existing static web app (web/) in a native Android WebView host (android/). This is deliberately NOT a native rewrite: the web/ app is the app, Capacitor is just the shell so push/GPS/camera/biometric can arrive later as Capacitor plugins (separate tickets) without giving up the instant web-deploy cadence.

scripts.// scripts: These are thin wrappers around the Capacitor CLI so contributors don't have to remember the flags. `npx cap sync android` copies web/ into the native project and updates native deps; run it after every web/ change before building the APK.
